title: Subterranean Telecom
summary: A Cold-War switching room — graphite, one muted teal rule, five engraved patch labels (SI/01 … LG/05) instead of icons. Quiet infrastructure.
darkAccent: muted signal teal #3E8A78 — active dock 2 px left bar + saving/stale pill + primary CTA
typeface: Recursive Sans (Linear, proportional) — single variable face, weight axis carries display and body; MONO axis only inside the editor blocks
railTreatment: five hand-cut patch labels — uppercase pair SI / SM / BP / DB / LG with a half-size serial code /01 /02 /03 /04 /05 typeset to the right; all proportional Recursive medium; active brightens to ink and adds a 2 px teal left rule
